tesda_unit_of_competency: Communicate basic personal and social information in Spanish (CEFR A1)

roots.example_es: Saludo a mis amigos por la mañana.
roots.example_en: I greet my friends in the morning.
roots.example_fil: Binabati ko ang aking mga kaibigan sa umaga.

roots.example_en: My name is Ana. What is your name?
roots.example_fil: Ang pangalan ko ay Ana. Ano ang pangalan mo?

roots.example_es: Soy estudiante y ella es profesora.
roots.example_en: I am a student and she is a teacher.
roots.example_fil: Ako ay estudyante at siya ay guro.

roots.example_en: I am well, thank you. How are you?
roots.example_fil: Mabuti naman ako, salamat. Kumusta ka?

roots.example_es: Te presento a mi amigo Carlos.
roots.example_en: Let me introduce you to my friend Carlos.
roots.example_fil: Ipakikilala kita sa aking kaibigang si Carlos.

roots.example_en: My name is Pedro.
roots.example_fil: Ang pangalan ko ay Pedro.

roots.example_es: ¡Buenos días! Hoy es un buen día.
roots.example_en: Good morning! Today is a good day.
roots.example_fil: Magandang umaga! Magandang araw ngayon.

roots.example_en: How do you spell your surname?
roots.example_fil: Paano binabaybay ang apelyido mo?

roots.example_en: The word 'casa' has four letters.
roots.example_fil: Ang salitang 'casa' ay may apat na titik.

roots.example_es: Mi número de teléfono es muy fácil.
roots.example_en: My phone number is very easy.
roots.example_fil: Napakadali ng numero ng telepono ko.

roots.example_es: Cuento del uno al diez en español.
roots.example_en: I count from one to ten in Spanish.
roots.example_fil: Bumibilang ako mula isa hanggang sampu sa Espanyol.

roots.example_es: Tengo un hermano y una hermana.
roots.example_en: I have one brother and one sister.
roots.example_fil: Mayroon akong isang kapatid na lalaki at isang babae.

roots.example_en: The Philippines is a beautiful country.
roots.example_fil: Ang Pilipinas ay isang magandang bansa.

roots.example_en: My nationality is Filipino.
roots.example_fil: Ang aking nasyonalidad ay Pilipino.

roots.example_es: Vivo en Manila con mi familia.
roots.example_en: I live in Manila with my family.
roots.example_fil: Nakatira ako sa Maynila kasama ang aking pamilya.

roots.example_es: Mi familia es grande y unida.
roots.example_en: My family is large and close.
roots.example_fil: Ang aking pamilya ay malaki at matatag.

roots.example_es: Mi padre trabaja en un hospital.
roots.example_en: My father works in a hospital.
roots.example_fil: Ang aking ama ay nagtatrabaho sa ospital.

roots.example_en: My mother's name is Rosa.
roots.example_fil: Ang pangalan ng aking ina ay Rosa.

roots.example_es: Mi hermano es más alto que yo.
roots.example_en: My brother is taller than me.
roots.example_fil: Mas matangkad ang kapatid kong lalaki kaysa sa akin.

roots.example_en: They have two children.
roots.example_fil: Mayroon silang dalawang anak.

roots.example_en: I work in a small office.
roots.example_fil: Nagtatrabaho ako sa isang maliit na opisina.

roots.example_es: Hablo tagalo, inglés y un poco de español.
roots.example_en: I speak Tagalog, English and a little Spanish.
roots.example_fil: Nagsasalita ako ng Tagalog, Ingles at kaunting Espanyol.

roots.example_en: My friend is from Cebu.
roots.example_fil: Ang kaibigan ko ay taga-Cebu.

roots.example_en: How old are you? I am twenty years old.
roots.example_fil: Ilang taon ka na? Beinte anyos na ako.

roots.example_en: Everything is fine, thank you very much.
roots.example_fil: Maayos ang lahat, maraming salamat.

roots.example_es: Tengo el pelo negro y los ojos cafés.
roots.example_en: I have black hair and brown eyes.
roots.example_fil: May itim akong buhok at kayumangging mga mata.

roots.example_es: Mi color favorito es el azul.
roots.example_en: My favorite color is blue.
roots.example_fil: Ang paborito kong kulay ay asul.

roots.example_en: My father is very tall.
roots.example_fil: Napakatangkad ng aking ama.

roots.example_en: She has long hair.
roots.example_fil: Mahaba ang buhok niya.

roots.example_es: Tiene los ojos grandes y oscuros.
roots.example_en: He/She has big, dark eyes.
roots.example_fil: Malalaki at maitim ang kanyang mga mata.

roots.example_es: El coche rojo es de mi hermana.
roots.example_en: The red car belongs to my sister.
roots.example_fil: Ang pulang kotse ay sa aking kapatid na babae.

roots.example_en: The sky is blue today.
roots.example_fil: Asul ang langit ngayon.

roots.example_en: The plants are green.
roots.example_fil: Berde ang mga halaman.

roots.example_en: The sun is yellow.
roots.example_fil: Ang araw ay dilaw.

roots.example_en: I am wearing a white shirt.
roots.example_fil: May suot akong puting kamiseta.

roots.example_en: Thank you very much for your help.
roots.example_fil: Maraming salamat sa iyong tulong.

roots.example_es: Una mesa para dos, por favor.
roots.example_en: A table for two, please.
roots.example_fil: Isang mesa para sa dalawa, pakiusap.

roots.example_en: Sorry, can you repeat, please?
roots.example_fil: Paumanhin, maaari mo bang ulitin, pakiusap?

roots.example_en: Excuse me, I need to pass.
roots.example_fil: Makikiraan po, kailangan kong dumaan.

roots.gloss_en: pleasure (mucho gusto = nice to meet you)
roots.gloss_fil: kasiyahan (mucho gusto = ikinagagalak kong makilala ka)
roots.example_en: Nice to meet you.
roots.example_fil: Ikinagagalak kong makilala ka.
